extortion.description: [AI generated] RattanIndia Power, formerly Indiabulls Power, is a leading company in the Indian energy sector. It is part of the RattanIndia Group and operates in the field of power generation and infrastructure. It focuses on developing, constructing and operating power projects in India. These projects consist of both thermal power projects as well as renewable energy projects such as solar and wind. The objective of the company is to provide reliable and clean power, contributing to the sustainable development of India.
